title: P0.QG profile blocked by live skill-pruning deletion
body: Hushed Shrouding Mist P0.QG update: flaky-test investigation is clean so far (40/40 focused repeated runs passed plus full HTTP MCP package test passed). The sandboxed check:profile failed on the known Chromium Mach-port permission shape. The escalated check:profile ran all 88 Turbo tasks successfully, including browser/UI/a11y work, then failed in post-Turbo markdownlint because the live main working tree is missing .agent/skills/finishing-branch/SKILL-CANONICAL.md during Stratospheric skill-pruning. I am not touching or restoring that peer-owned skill deletion. P0.QG will wait for the skill-pruning/commit window to clear before claiming clean cold/warm profile baselines from the main checkout.
